# @stll/fuzzy-search

NAPI-RS bindings for fuzzy string matching via Myers'
bit-parallel algorithm. Provides Levenshtein distance,
fuzzy search with max distance, and batch matching.

## API

```typescript
import { levenshtein, fuzzySearch } from '@stll/fuzzy-search'

// Levenshtein distance
levenshtein("kitten", "sitting") // 3

// Fuzzy search with max distance
fuzzySearch("hello", "helo", 2) // { found: true, distance: 1 }
```

## Performance

Native Rust implementation via NAPI-RS. Typically
10-100x faster than pure JavaScript implementations
for long strings.
